## ARC Draft Submission

Use this template when proposing a **new numbered ARC draft** after `Pre-ARC` acceptance.

## Summary

Provide a concise summary of the proposed ARC.

## Canonical References

- Pre-ARC Discussion:
- Tracking Issue:
- ARC File:
- Adoption Summary File:
- Related Issues / PRs:

## Draft Gate Checklist

- [ ] A `Pre-ARC` discussion exists.
- [ ] The `Pre-ARC` discussion outcome was `accepted-for-draft`.
- [ ] Existing ARCs and related work were reviewed.
- [ ] The ARC has a defined scope.
- [ ] The ARC includes all relevant sections.
- [ ] The ARC declares `sponsor`.
- [ ] The ARC declares `implementation-required`.
- [ ] The ARC declares `adoption-summary`.
- [ ] The ARC complies with the style and formatting guidelines.

## Requested Maintainer Action

- [ ] Assign ARC number
- [ ] Create / confirm tracking issue

## Notes for Reviewers

Include any specific areas where feedback is requested.
